target.title: fix(agent): wait for retained session write before releasing held lock on abort
target.body:
## Root Cause

When an embedded run abort fires during an active session write scope, `takeHeldLockAfterRetainedIdle()` and `disposeHeldLockAfterRetainedIdle()` both bail out immediately (returning `undefined` / early-returning) when `waitForRetainedLockIdle()` returns false. This leaves `heldLock` still set. The subsequent `acquireCleanupLock()` call tries `acquireLock()` which fails with EEXIST (the lock file is still held by the prior owner), returns a noopLock whose release is a no-op, and the underlying file lock leaks until the `maxHoldMs` watchdog timer fires (90-350s later).

## Summary

- Session write lock was never released when abort fired during an active session write, causing a ~90-350s leak window
- Both `takeHeldLockAfterRetainedIdle()` and `disposeHeldLockAfterRetainedIdle()` now wait for the retained write to complete (via the existing `retainedLockIdleWaiters` notification set) instead of bailing out immediately
- `releaseHeldLockWithFence()` is left unchanged to keep the prompt-release path minimally invasive — the fix only touches the two abort-triggered paths that need the held lock
- Fixes #95915

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts` — 105 passed
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts` — 116 passed
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts` — 6 passed
- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts` — 2 passed
- `pnpm openclaw doctor` — clean runtime validation
- CI: all checks passing

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Session write lock leak on embedded run abort — held lock not released when abort fires during retained session write scope.

Real environment tested: Linux x86_64, Node v24.13.1, branch `fix/issue-95915-session-lock-abort`, commit `3213604b0d`

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
pnpm build
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix:

```console
# Binary version matches HEAD commit
$ pnpm openclaw --version
OpenClaw 2026.6.9 (3213604)

$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
3213604b0d

# Full session-lock test suite: 105 passed
$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  105 passed (105)

# Abort path tests: 2 passed
$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  2 passed (2)

# Retained lock idle waiter tests: 5 passed
$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts -t "retained"
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed | 100 skipped (105)

# Full attempt test suite: 116 passed
$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  116 passed (116)

# Subscription cleanup tests: 6 passed
$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  6 passed (6)

# Runtime validation via openclaw doctor
$ pnpm openclaw doctor
▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄
██░▄▄▄░██░▄▄░██░▄▄▄██░▀██░██░▄▄▀██░████░▄▄▀██░███░██
██░███░██░▀▀░██░▄▄▄██░█░█░██░█████░████░▀▀░██░█░█░██
██░▀▀▀░██░█████░▀▀▀██░██▄░██░▀▀▄██░▀▀░█░██░██▄▀▄▀▄██
▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀
                       OPENCLAW

┌  OpenClaw doctor
│  ◇  Config warnings (local env stale entries only, non-blocking)
│  └  Doctor completed successfully
```

Observed result after fix: All 229 tests passed across 5 test suites. Binary (OpenClaw 2026.6.9) matches HEAD commit `3213604b0d`. `pnpm openclaw doctor` runs successfully, confirming the binary is functional on the actual runtime environment. The retained lock idle waiter correctly waits for active writes to complete before releasing the held lock during abort cleanup.

What was not tested: Live embedded run abort with concurrent session write in a running agent session — the existing unit tests cover the lock lifecycle and abort paths; a Crabbox/Testbox live scenario would provide additional runtime confidence.
target.author: xialonglee
